code:
import io
import string

fn get_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn abs_int(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have_best = false
mut best = 0
mut best_abs = 0

while i < n
  let b = get_byte(line, i)
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    i = i + 1
  else
    mut sign = 1
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut parsing = true
    while parsing
      if i >= n
        parsing = false
      else
        let d = get_byte(line, i)
        if d >= 48 and d <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (d - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          parsing = false
        end
      end
    end
    let signed = val * sign
    let a = abs_int(signed)
    if not have_best
      best = signed
      best_abs = a
      have_best = true
    else if a < best_abs
      best = signed
      best_abs = a
    end
  end
end

println("min_abs=#{best}")
